# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for service mesh security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: microservice-routes
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/api/v1"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: backend-service.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 8080
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/api/v2"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: backend-v2-service.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 8080
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: frontend-service.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 3000
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: backend-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: backend-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 100
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_REQUEST
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: backend-v2-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: backend-v2-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 100
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_REQUEST
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: frontend-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: frontend-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 200
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-authz
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/api-gateway"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-authz
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-v2-authz
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-v2-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        paths: ["/api/v2/*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-peer-authn
  namespace: default
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: default
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notNamespaces: ["default", "istio-system"]
